title: Immersive Reality
description: A hardcore reality survival modpack inspired from RLCraft.
body:
# Immersive Reality

This modpack is inspired from [RLCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/rlcraft) and try to restore it on 1.20.1

**This modpack is still under construction and any content may change. So do not use beta version to host a server!**

Recommended Memory: 4G or above (2G is ok but a bit too lag)

## Features
- Body part health, thirst, temperature system, nutrition. (Eating food will no longer heal.)
- New weapons, tools and armors.
- 100+ more biomes in overworld mainly by Terralith; Better Nether and Better End.
- 100+ more structures include utility and decorating purpose.
- Season and better weather.
- Advanced skill system.
- Make blocks and items more physics and need to sneak to pick them up.
- Better Sound Engine to make surrounding(real) sounds.
- A more real technology system based on Create and Refined Storage 2.
- More foods based on Farmers' Delight.
- Lots of utility mods on both client and server.
- Fully optimized. (Thanks to Fabric)
- Ban F3 and minimap. Use a handy map instead. (Press `M`)
- More reasonable recipes & Vertical stairs.
- Random respawn. (Have a range of 2000 blocks)

## Planned
- Quests.
- More hardcore tweaks
